---
title: "Claims in code and quotes"
date: 2026-01-01T00:00:00+09:00
lastmod: 2026-01-02T00:00:00+09:00
tags: ["alpha"]
---

```text
Throughput improved by 42% after the change.
응답 시간이 120ms로 줄었다.
```

> Quoted: revenue rose 12% according to someone else.

    indented code: latency dropped 50% here too

A normal paragraph with the words `improved by 42%` only inside inline code.
